verified_already_fixed.description: Faction default 0 vs 20 mismatch — verified FACTION_SCORE_START=20 in merlin_constants.gd, merlin_reputation_system.gd, merlin_save_system.gd, merlin_store.gd. All correct.
Deterministic minigame selection — pick_minigame_for_field() now uses randi() % size instead of field.hash() % size. Already randomized.

features_deployed.description: RetroRenderPipeline autoload — unified PSX/N64 post-processing. Bayer 8x8 dithering, color quantization (24 levels), time-of-day tinting (7 periods), seasonal color grading (4 seasons), film grain. 3 presets: off/subtle/full. CanvasLayer 98.

overall_assessment: First feature cycle. Retro visual pipeline deployed, addressing creator feedback on PSX/N64 aesthetic and time/season-based ambiance. Zero bugs remaining. 16 total bugs resolved across 5 cycles.
